examples: The meal that followed was a veritable banquet.
I began to see a veritable army of mothers and one father pushing a stroller while talking on the cell phone.
The virgin forest with its richness and variety of trees was a veritable real treasure-house which extended from Maine all the way down to Georgia
Constantly working to refine their product, Match.com is a veritable lab of dating science.
Included is a veritable cemetery of old retail haunts, including Circuit City and Border Group.
